name: Peppermint Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cream shortening and sugar replacement until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg and beat well.
4. Add melted chocolate, peppermint oil, and vanilla; blend thoroughly.
5. Beat in yogurt.
6. Alternately add flour mixture and milk in small amounts, beating well after each addition.
7. Pour batter into two well-greased 9-inch pans or one 9" X 13" pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 40 minutes or until cake is done.
